items.title: I Sold My AI Startup Before Revenue: Here’s What Investors Missed — And Founders Shouldn’t
items.description: The greatest long-term value in AI will come from companies solving deep technical challenges at the model and infrastructure level rather than application-layer products built on existing AI platform
